title: FileUploadedEvent
description: Integration event published by the EnterpriseLink Ingestion service when a CSV file has been successfully validated and durably stored. Consumed by the Worker service to begin asynchronous CSV parsing, row validation, and persistence.

uploadId.description: Unique identifier for this upload session. Acts as the idempotency key — consumers must check whether this ID has already been processed before beginning work.

tenantId.description: Internal EnterpriseLink tenant identifier. All rows parsed from the file must be persisted with this tenantId to enforce row-level tenant isolation.

storagePath.description: Relative storage path where the raw file has been persisted. Format: {tenantId}/{uploadId}/{fileName}. The Worker resolves the absolute path by combining this with the configured storage root.

fileName.description: Original file name as provided by the client (sanitised by the storage service to strip path-traversal sequences).

fileSizeBytes.description: File size in bytes as reported by the multipart boundary. Used by the Worker to validate the stored file was not truncated during transfer.

dataRowCount.description: Number of data rows detected by the Ingestion service (header row excluded). Used by the Worker as a pre-validation hint for data integrity checks.

sourceSystem.description: Identifies the upstream system of record that produced the file. Determines which column mapping and validation rules the Worker applies.

uploadedAt.description: UTC timestamp at which the Ingestion service accepted, validated, and stored the file. Used for SLA tracking and dead-letter analysis.

x-changelog.changes: Initial schema definition. All eight properties required. No additional properties permitted.
